title: Better Together!!!
excerpt: Can't believe that my tenth collection with American Crafts is debuting this weekend at CHA (now Creativation)! TENTH! We are in double digits, people! WOO! So grateful that the collaboration has been such a big part of my life for…
body:
Can't believe that my tenth collection with American Crafts is debuting this weekend at CHA (now Creativation)! TENTH! We are in double digits, people! WOO! So grateful that the collaboration has been such a big part of my life for the past 5 years. It brings such joy seeing all you creatives working with the collections and having it show up alongside your precious and fun memories.  Initially I wanted this collection to reflect a love story of sorts - all those things that are "better together" whether it be person to person or thing to thing. You'll notice the names of the papers and some of the products go hand in hand, like "blogs + coffee", "sun + moon", "cut + paste". When brainstorming for names of products (usually this happens near the end of the design process) we wanted to name some of them: Pam + Jim, Carrie + Big, Benny + Joon, but opted to go with the others. I'll be sharing more behind the scenes info on Better Together and keep you all updated on when the collection hits stores (I'm guessing March, but I could be wrong). Thanks so much for all of your continued support and love - be sure to scroll all the way down and leave a comment for your chance to win a prize pack. There's also a chance on the American Crafts blog  as well!

Capture joyful life moments with Better Together, the new everyday collection by Amy Tangerine featuring her signature watercolor style and handwritten words and quotes. Bold patterns and graphics are presented in eye-catching, playful hues of blue, red, yellow, orange and pink.  Add an element of fun with products that feature florals, food items, bikes and more!  

Hope you like what you see so far! For all you young folks - those are cassette tapes! 

UPDATED: GIVEAWAY IS NOW CLOSED. Leave a comment below to win a prize pack from the collection! Comments will close on Tuesday, January 12 at 8pm PT and a random winner will be announced shortly after. Thank you! THANKS TO ALL WHO ENTERED - YOUR POSITIVE COMMENTS WERE SO FUN TO READ!

CONGRATS Raquel, you are the winner!! Please respond to the email you've been sent. Thanks!
